mapper.select: SELECT template_id, template_key, template_name, domain_type, feature_key, template_role, template_type, revision_no, is_active, created_at, created_id, updated_at, updated_id FROM tb_mst_ai_prompt_template WHERE 1=1 AND is_active = 1 AND is_active = 0 AND template_type = #{templateType} AND domain_type = #{domainType} ORDER BY template_id DESC

SELECT template_id, template_key, template_name, domain_type, feature_key, template_role, template_type, content, variables_schema_json, description, revision_no, is_active, created_at, created_id, updated_at, updated_id FROM tb_mst_ai_prompt_template WHERE template_id = #{templateId}

SELECT template_id, template_key, template_name, domain_type, feature_key, template_role, template_type, content, variables_schema_json, description, revision_no, is_active, created_at, created_id, updated_at, updated_id FROM tb_mst_ai_prompt_template WHERE template_key = #{templateKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_mst_ai_prompt_template ( template_key, template_name, domain_type, feature_key, template_role, template_type, content, variables_schema_json, description, revision_no, is_active, created_id, updated_id ) VALUES ( #{templateKey}, #{templateName}, #{domainType}, #{featureKey}, #{templateRole}, #{templateType}, #{content}, #{variablesSchemaJson}, #{description}, #{revisionNo}, #{isActive}, #{createdId}, #{updatedId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_mst_ai_prompt_template SET template_name = #{templateName}, domain_type = #{domainType}, feature_key = #{featureKey}, template_role = #{templateRole}, template_type = #{templateType}, content = #{content}, variables_schema_json = #{variablesSchemaJson}, description = #{description}, revision_no = #{revisionNo}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_id = #{updatedId} WHERE template_id = #{templateId}
